headerSub: Falanqayn maaliyadeed oo diyaar u ah guddiga · Luqad hore u dhigta boqolkiiba · Kooban-yaraha fulinta
noDataMessage: Soo geli xog ama ku xir il si aad halkan uga aragto tirakoobyada maaliyadeed.
reportFallback: Warbixin waa la sameeyay — xog weli lama hayo. Ku xir il xog ah si aad u hesho tirooyin dhab ah.
reportError: Warbixinta lama samayn karin. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
plSummaryPrompt: I sii kooban P&L ah oo qaab-CFO ah muddadan — isticmaal luqad hore u dhigta boqolkiiba oo iftiimi kala-duwanaanshaha ugu muhiimsan.
cashRunwayPrompt: Immisa bilood oo lacag muddo ah ayaan ku haystaa heerka gubashada hadda? Waa maxay xaaladaha haddii dakhliga uu hoos u dhaco 10% ama 20%?
marginAnalysisPrompt: Falanqee faa'iidadayda guud ee qaybaha badeecada oo calaamadi wax kasta oo faa'iido-samaynta hoos u dhigaya marka la barbardhigo muddadii hore.
boardReportPrompt: Samee kooban fulineed hal-bog ah oo diyaar u ah guddiga oo ku saabsan waxqabadka ganacsigayga muddadan, adigoo dhammaan isticmaalaya luqad hore u dhigta boqolkiiba.
workingCapitalPrompt: Qiimee xaaladda raasumaalkayga shaqada — lacagaha la sugayo, lacagaha la bixinayo, kaydka. Xaggee ayaa ku jira caqabadaha wareegga u-beddelaadda lacagta?
costStructurePrompt: U kala saar qaab-dhismeedka kharashkayga oo aqoonso 3-da meelood ee ugu sarreeya ee aan ku yarayn karo kharashaadka anigoon saameyn ku yeelan koritaanka.
